title: Mapzy
description: Free, simple, open-source and self-hostable store finder / store locator you can embed on any website.
installation: Rails (Puma) app backed by PostgreSQL only; no Redis required. Rotate SECRET_KEY_BASE (generate with `openssl rand -hex 64`, must be a long alphanumeric string) and the postgres credentials before going to production. MAPBOX_ACCESS_TOKEN is REQUIRED for map tiles - sign up at mapbox.com and paste your token (Mapbox is an external third-party service, not bundled). On first boot set INIT_USER_EMAIL / INIT_USER_PASSWORD to seed an admin account, or set ALLOW_REGISTRATION=true to self-register. MISSION_CONTROL_USERNAME / _PASSWORD protect the background-jobs dashboard - rotate them. Set RAILS_SERVE_STATIC_FILES=true so assets are served by the container.
